data.title: Implement spatial_merge.py: visual override merge with designer-added/removed handling
data.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/spatial_merge.py with the merge_spatial() function that merges Figma-derived spatial-layout.json with the original manifest.

## testing_mode: RED — new behavioral content. Depends on RED test task 6ce1-a144.

## Interface
merge_spatial(original: dict, figma_derived: dict, identity_matches: dict, unmatched_new: list, unmatched_original: list) -> tuple[dict, list[str]]
Returns: (merged_spatial_layout, warnings) where warnings is a list of warning strings for COMPLETE spec removals.

## Implementation Steps
1. Import identity_match from figma_node_mapper (already implemented in 147a-5eec)
2. For each component in figma_derived: find its original counterpart via identity_matches; update visual properties (spatial_hint, props.fills, props.strokes, text) from Figma; preserve all other fields from original
3. For each unmatched_new component: add with tag=NEW, designer_added=True, behavioral_spec_status=INCOMPLETE
4. For each unmatched_original component: if behavioral_spec_status==COMPLETE, add warning message; remove from output regardless
5. Return (merged_dict, warnings_list)

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/spatial_merge.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/spatial_merge.py exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/spatial_merge.py
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py exits 0 (all SM-1 through SM-7 pass)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_spatial.py --tb=short -q
- [ ] Function does not use jq
  Verify: ! grep -q 'jq' plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/spatial_merge.py
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
